entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Grain sorghum grown in environments of highly variable water supply.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by water deficits and variable water supply.

entities.name: GENOTYPE-BY-ENVIRONMENT INTERACTIONS
entities.description: Interactions between genotype and environment that complicate the definition of target environments and traits.

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand water deficits, serving as a target for breeding improvement.

entities.name: SORGHUM SIMULATION MODELS
entities.description: Tools used to characterize environmental challenges and assess the value and action of traits.

entities.name: INTEGRATED SYSTEMS ANALYSIS
entities.description: A multidisciplinary approach involving physiologists, agronomists, and plant breeders to improve selection efficiency.

entities.name: SELECTION CRITERIA
entities.description: Traits used as a basis for selecting plants during the breeding process.
